description.value:
Send Prescription processing aanvullendeinstructie building blocks for patient C. XXX_Coenen
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 2 Aanvullende instructie Aanvullende instructie (TA)
Send Prescription processing aanvullendeinstructie resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1137891') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '68632') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '117145') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1137891') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '68632') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '117145') ))).where((quantity.value = 180)).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1137891|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (ACETYLSALICYLZUUR CARDIO AUROBINDO DISP TABL 80MG)
